name: runstats
description: Local-first running and health stats app scaffold.

scripts.install:all: uv --project backend sync --extra dev && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.backend:lint: cd backend && uv run ruff check .
scripts.backend:typecheck: cd backend && uv run mypy runstats
scripts.backend:validate: npm run backend:test && npm run backend:lint && npm run backend:typecheck
scripts.frontend:validate: npm run frontend:test && npm run frontend:lint && npm run frontend:typecheck && npm run frontend:build
scripts.package:local: npm run package:frontend && npm run package:backend
scripts.validate: npm run backend:validate && npm run frontend:validate
